ground_truth.author_rationale: One of each family: version error (5 fps is the firmware-1.0 value reported for 2.0); scope error (kit-lens sealing extended from the body-only sealing); unsupported assertion (600-shot battery rating not stated); residue erasure (unmeasured RAW buffer depth presented as 42 frames).

warning: AUTHOR-ONLY. Never assembled into rater-visible material. The runner's prompt-assembly guard forbids reading this directory.
